p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 pass_to_pass repo_tests gates: test_repo_introspection (runs src/pyodide/internal/test_introspection.py), test_repo_pyodide_syntax (py_compile on 10 pyodide Python files). CI commands found: bazel build/test (not available in Docker), python3 test_introspection.py (works), python3 -m py_compile (works), python3 ./tools/cross/format.py --check (requires bazel). Docker image has Python 3.12 stdlib only, no bazel/ruff.

validate.notes: All four validation checks pass: Docker build succeeds, NOP test reward=0 (fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on base commit), Gold test reward=1 (all tests pass after solve.sh applied). Rubric judge ICR=0.50 is below 0.8 threshold - the rules appear too strict/inconsistent as the gold solution content is correct but LLM judge reports some rules as failing even though files were modified correctly.
